original_description: Capture and triage failures, surprises, and unexpected behaviors during work sessions. Triggers on [SNAG], unexpected errors, tool failures, approach abandonment, or when a workaround was needed. Records structured failure data to mulch and creates seeds issues for unresolved failures.
best_description: Capture and triage failures, surprises, and unexpected behaviors during work sessions. history.description: Capture and triage failures, surprises, and unexpected behaviors during work sessions. Triggers on [SNAG], unexpected errors, tool failures, approach abandonment, or when a workaround was needed. train_results.query: need to capture that the grpc streaming approach failed due to cloudflare's 100s timeout — created a workaround using polling
ok I give up on the oauth2 pkce flow with keycloak, using client credentials instead. want to record why
something weird happened — db migration ran clean but rows are missing in staging. not sure why yet
just hit a [SNAG] with the webpack config, it's silently ignoring my aliases
that assumption about useLayoutEffect was completely wrong, cost me an hour, want to record this so it doesnt happen again
had to abandon the redis approach entirely, switched to in-memory cache as a workaround — should capture this somewhere
the build is failing in CI, can you look at the GHA logs and figure out what's wrong
the approach failed review, need to record the feedback and update my implementation plan
I keep making the same mistakes in this codebase — let's audit what patterns are causing recurring bugs
we keep hitting the same auth bug in this codebase, let's write characterization tests before touching it
debugging this race condition — can't figure out why the mutex isn't holding. help me trace through the execution
the websocket reconnection logic surprised me — document how it actually works before we change it

test_results.query: the approach i was taking with the AST transform doesnt work for generics. documenting this dead end before pivoting
tool call failed again — gh pr create just hung for 2 minutes and died with no error message
the stripe webhook handler keeps timing out but only in prod, not locally. third attempt at fixing this. logging the failure
foxhound returned empty for 'hook payload schema' — nothing useful, had to guess. [SNAG]
something unexpected happened in prod last night — need to write a postmortem doc for the incident
log all the decisions from this session before I close it out
I want to stress test the payments API to find edge cases before we go live
we had a bad deploy last quarter because mocked tests passed but real db migration failed — capture that as a decision
